1747840.name: BetterRecorder - Capture Screen, Video, Audio for Mac
1747840.description:
Main features:
Recording screen.
Recording window.
Recording camera video.
Recording micphone audio.
Recording computer audio.


Advanced features:
Support hotkeys.
Support imultaneously record screen/display, camera, micphone and computer audio.

Output Format:
mp4, mkv, mov
1747840.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 日语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 越南语, 韩语
